ddls:
CREATE TABLE "fishing_areas" (
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fishing area */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region code of the fishing area */,
  "boundary" TEXT /* Description of the boundary for the fishing area */,
  "description" TEXT /* Additional description of the fishing area */,
  "status" TEXT /* Regulatory status of the area (e.g., open, closed, restricted) */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species of groundfish allowed to be caught in the area */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the area information was last updated */,
  "area_size" REAL /* Size of the fishing area in square kilometers */,
  "ecological_impact" TEXT /* Assessment of the ecological impact of fishing in the area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fishing_lines" (
  "line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fishing line */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fishing area it belongs to */,
  "start_lat" REAL /* Latitude of the starting point of the fishing line */,
  "start_lon" REAL /* Longitude of the starting point of the fishing line */,
  "end_lat" REAL /* Latitude of the ending point of the fishing line */,
  "end_lon" REAL /* Longitude of the ending point of the fishing line */,
  "line_length" REAL /* Length of the fishing line in kilometers */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date and time when the fishing line was created */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date and time when the fishing line was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("line_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fishing_lines_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES fishing_areas ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., regulator, researcher, fisherman) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date and time when the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fishing_activity_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fishing area where the activity occurred */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., catch, survey) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the activity */,
  "activity_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the activity (e.g., number of fish caught, survey results) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Specific location within the area where the activity occurred */,
  "equipment_used" TEXT /* Type of equipment used during the activity */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the activity in hours */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Approval status of the activity (e.g., approved, pending, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fishing_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fishing_activity_logs_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES fishing_areas ("area_id")
)
